hooks.command: echo codex > ~/.claude/.sebi-provider && echo 'PROVIDER SWITCHED TO CODEX (gpt-5.4). Respond to the user confirming the switch.'
echo firstParty > ~/.claude/.sebi-provider && echo 'PROVIDER SWITCHED TO CLAUDE (Opus 4.6). Respond to the user confirming the switch.'
echo "Current provider: $(cat ~/.claude/.sebi-provider 2>/dev/null || echo firstParty). Use /provider codex or /provider claude to switch."
